body:
> [!NOTE]
> When the `sampling.priority` tag has a positive value we now translate that to `forceKeep` to ensure the trace segment is kept regardless of any previous sampling decision
# Components

## Application Security Management (IAST)

* :bug::closed_lock_with_key: Fix AppSec/IAST context dropped when trace.propagation.behavior.extract=ignore/restart (#11666 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Improve performance of regexps in IAST and query obfuscator (#11649 - @manuel-alvarez-alvarez)
* :bug: Fix IAST JDBC instrumentation when getMetadata throws non-SQLException (#11420 - @smola)

## Application Security Management (WAF)

* :bug: Fix unbounded multipart form-field buffering in Jetty 8 PartHelper (#11876 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Add request_excluded tag to appsec.waf.requests metric (#11744 - @jandro996)
* :bug: Fix rasp.rule.match metric always reporting block:N/A (#11723 - @jandro996)
* :bug::closed_lock_with_key: Fix AppSec/IAST context dropped when trace.propagation.behavior.extract=ignore/restart (#11666 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Fix waf.updates metric success:N/A tag from sequential counter metric values (#11604 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Implement SCA Reachability runtime detection: report vulnerable classes and callsites via telemetry (#11352 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Add server.request.body.filenames AppSec address for Vert.x 3.4, 4.0 and 5.0 (#11268 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Add server.request.body.filenames support for Jetty (#10988 - @jandro996)

## Build & Tooling

* :sparkles::closed_lock_with_key: Forbid `OkHostnameVerifier` to prevent accidental use, CVE-2021-0341 (#11694 - @bric3)

## Configuration at Runtime

* :sparkles: Avoid logging stack trace during expected remote-config exception (#11328 - @sarahchen6)

## Configuration

* :sparkles: Add OTLP Trace Metrics Configs (#11653 - @mhlidd)
* :sparkles::zap: Optimize collection creation and memory allocation of supported config (#11616 - @PerfectSlayer)

## Continuous Integration Visibility

* :sparkles: Avoid final field modifications in Karate instrumentation (#11753 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Avoid final field modification in Weaver instrumentation (#11728 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :bug: Disable invokedynamic bytecode for legacy Gradle instrumentation (#11618 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Support Maven generateTestClasspath lookup on 3.6.0+ (#11577 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Truncate CI Visibility meta tag values (#11485 - @juan-fernandez)

## Crash Tracking

* :bulb: Include JVM distribution details in crash report (#11715 - @gyuheon0h)
* :sparkles: Improve crash report message when signal is absent (#11681 - @amarziali)
* :bug: Avoid crashtracking temp-script path hijack (#11613 - @jbachorik)

## Data Streams Monitoring

* :sparkles: Update EventBridge DSM topic naming (#11603 - @jeastham1993)

## Dynamic Instrumentation

* :bug: Fix Kotlin Debug source mapping (#11803 - @jpbempel)
* :sparkles: Add evaluation timeout for expressions (#11741 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix Spring MethodParameters detection (#11647 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix sampling log probe with capture expressions (#11571 - @jpbempel)

## Metrics

* :sparkles::broom: Update `AggregateEntry` to Split OK/Error Latencies (#11719 - @mhlidd)
* :sparkles::zap: Lazy-allocate error latency histogram on AggregateEntry (#11478 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Introduce per-component / tag cardinality limits in client-side stats (#11387 - @dougqh)

## OpenFeature

* :bug: Use agent OTel metrics for OpenFeature evaluations (#11745 - @sameerank)
* :bug: Skip malformed FFE flags during config parsing (#11534 - @leoromanovsky)
* :broom: Use canonical FFE fixtures (#11355 - @leoromanovsky)

## Profiling

* :bug: Bump ddprof to 1.46.0 (#11858 - @jbachorik)
  * Add alternative TLS implementation to fix a crash on musl/aarch64 by @zhengyu123 in https://github.com/DataDog/java-profiler/pull/600
  * Don't preload jmethodIDs when cstack=vm with hotspot JVM by @zhengyu123 in https://github.com/DataDog/java-profiler/pull/549
  * Scope OTEL ThreadContext storage to the carrier thread (PROF-15271) by @rkennke in https://github.com/DataDog/java-profiler/pull/625
  * Close two TOCTOU races between SIGPROF handler and JFR lifecycle by @r1viollet in https://github.com/DataDog/java-profiler/pull/614
* :bug: Request carrier-scoped ddprof context storage on JDK 21+ (#11826 - @rkennke)
* :bug: Restore app context attributes wiped by ddprof setContext on span activation (#11646 - @jbachorik)
* :bug: Publish thread context attribute keys at process start (#11558 - @ivoanjo)
* :sparkles: Add force jmethodID experimental feature support (#11549 - @zhengyu123)

## Telemetry

* :sparkles: Migrate SCA Reachability to method-level symbol database (sca-reachability-symbols) (#11614 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Fix waf.updates metric success:N/A tag from sequential counter metric values (#11604 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Implement SCA Reachability runtime detection: report vulnerable classes and callsites via telemetry (#11352 - @jandro996)

## Trace context propagation

* :bug::closed_lock_with_key: Fix AppSec/IAST context dropped when trace.propagation.behavior.extract=ignore/restart (#11666 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Implement an Org Propagation Guard mechanism (#11289 - @amarziali)

## Tracer core

* :sparkles: Introduce api-management inferred proxy spans to Azure (#11804 - @TophrC-dd)
* :broom: Migrate simple try-with-resources use of `AgentScope` to `ContextScope` (#11763 - @mcculls)
* :zap::broom: Overhaul set benchmarks: split Immutable / SingleThreaded, add Set.copyOf (#11721 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Wire -Pjmh.includes and -PtestJvm into internal-api JMH config (#11703 - @dougqh)
* :bug::closed_lock_with_key: Fix AppSec/IAST context dropped when trace.propagation.behavior.extract=ignore/restart (#11666 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Update jnr-unixsocket dependency to 0.38.25 (#11615 - @mcculls)
* :sparkles: Update dd-instrument-java dependency to v0.0.4 (#11567 - @mcculls)
* :sparkles: Update byte-buddy dependency to 1.18.10 (#11565 - @mcculls)
* :sparkles::zap: Pre-construct TagMap.Entry objects in InternalTagsAdder (#11555 - @dougqh)
* :bug: Fix JDBC URL parsing crash when no port specified (#11550 - @ValentinZakharov)
* :bug: Build DatadogClassLoader resource URL from agent jar URL, not OS path (#11480 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Include advice class name in instrumentation exception handler log (#11457 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles::zap: Use `TagMap.set` in `CoreTracer` (#11106 - @dougqh)
* :book::zap: List iteration benchmark (#10888 - @dougqh)
* :book::zap: Atomics benchmark (#10862 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Adding lighter String processing methods to Strings (#10640 - @dougqh)

## Tracer public API

* :bulb::warning: Translate a `sampling.priority` tag set to a positive value to `forceKeep` (#11621 - @mcculls)
* :bug: Fix DDTraceId/DD64bTraceId class-initialization deadlock (#11509 - @bm1549)

# Instrumentations

## Apache HttpComponents

* :bug::closed_lock_with_key: Fix private headers leaking to a different origin on redirect (#11671 - @vandonr)

## Apache Spark instrumentation

* :sparkles: Inject ol_env into ol spark run tags (#11786 - @ajyu)

## Armeria Instrumentation

* :bug: Fix Ameria 1.40 instrumentation compatibility (#11827 - @vandonr)
* :sparkles: Ignore capturing connection continuation for armeria (#11657 - @amarziali)

## AWS Lambda instrumentation

* :bug: Don't add empty headers on lambda completion (#11551 - @amarziali)

## AWS SDK instrumentation

* :bug: Fix message handler spans appear disconnected from the incoming SQS trace (#11511 - @ygree)

## Azure Functions instrumentation

* :sparkles: Introduces the api-management inferred proxy spans to Azure (#11804 - @TophrC-dd)

## Core Java language instrumentation

* :sparkles: Avoid leaking continuations on jdk-http-client (#11557 - @amarziali)

## Eclipse Vert.x instrumentation

* :sparkles: Add support for Vert.x 5.1 in tracing (#11655 - @vandonr)

## JAX-RS instrumentation

* :sparkles: Avoid leaking continuations on internal rxjava schedulers (#11540 - @amarziali)

## JDBC instrumentation

* :bug::closed_lock_with_key: Fix password leak from JDBC URL (#11568 - @ValentinZakharov)
* :bug: Fix JDBC URL parsing crash when no port specified (#11550 - @ValentinZakharov)
* :bug: Fix IAST JDBC instrumentation when getMetadata throws non-SQLException (#11420 - @smola)

## Kafka instrumentation

* :bug: Add safe extraction for malformed base64 kafka headers (#11472 - @amarziali)

## Lettuce instrumentation

* :bug: Fix Redis command span decoration to resolve node connection for master-replica providers in Lettuce 5+ (#11819 - @ygree)
* :bug: Fine tune async propagation for lettuce 5 (#11607 - @amarziali)

## Netty instrumentation

* :sparkles: Do not capture continuation on netty GlobalEventExecutor static init (#11654 - @amarziali)
* :bug: Fix continuation leakage on netty http2 client pipeline (#11595 - @amarziali)

## Reactor instrumentation

* :broom: Make reactor-core / reactive-streams context propagation Context-first (#11578 - @amarziali)

## Servlet instrumentation

* :bug: Fix StackOverflowError in caused by missing re-entrancy guard (#11838 - @ValentinZakharov)
* :bug: Tolerate servlet 2.x wrappers used on servlet-3 classpath for isAsyncStarted calls (#11542 - @amarziali)

## Spring instrumentation

* :sparkles: Drop the duplicate handler resolution in Spring Web 6 instrumentation (#11533 - @amarziali)
* :bug: Build DatadogClassLoader resource URL from agent jar URL, not OS path (#11480 - @dougqh)

## All other instrumentations

* :sparkles: Add RxJava 3 instrumentation (#11849 - @ValentinZakharov)
* :sparkles: Support proper async propagation for GAX retrying futures (#11629 - @amarziali)
